name: Nixie Avatar State Assets
source: Gemini exported state JPGs converted to transparent PNG assets
notes: These are transparent state exports converted from the newer Nixie pose renders.
The React controller can replace any PNG with a Lottie JSON, MP4, WebM, SVG, WebP, or AVIF later without changing state names.
If true source PNGs with native transparency are provided later, these files can be replaced without changing code.
